description.value: Price 45,000 gp; Slot none; CL 11th; Weight 10 lbs.; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION Dried, lacquered, and stuffed with fragrant herbs, this mummified medusa head still contains a measure of the power the medusa possessed in life. While held, a meduseion radiates an unseen aura that causes all living creatures within 100 feet to take a –2 penalty on saving throws to resist poison or petrification effects. Three times per day as a standard action, the wielder of a meduseion can cause the eyes of the head to shoot forth a petrifying ray as a ranged touch attack with a maximum range of 100 feet. Creatures struck must succeed a DC 19 Fortitude save or be permanently transformed into stone. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells alarm, flesh to stone; Cost 22,500 gp
